results.name: snowfall
results.description: Cards that care about snow permanents entering the battlefield, not the weather condition.

results.name: sock and buskin
results.description: 🎭 The two masks of the performing arts.

results.name: solar eclipse
results.description: When the sun is hidden behind the moon. See also [lunar eclipse](/tags/artwork/lunar-eclipse) for the phenomenon of the moon being hidden in the planet's shadow.

results.name: sol land
results.description: Lands that mimic the mana ability of Sol Ring: add two colorless mana.

results.name: solo
results.description: Only one figure is present in these artworks.

results.name: soothsaying
results.description: Look at the top N cards of a library and rearrange them.

results.name: sothera
results.description: The star-turned-supervoid at the center of its eponymous system.

results.name: sothera system
results.description: The star system where the events of Edge of Eternities take place, named after its [main gravitational body](sothera).

results.name: soul warden ability
results.description: Creatures entering the battlefield causes you to gain N life.

results.name: southern air temple
results.description: The first Air Temple that Aang visited after leaving the iceberg, and the one where he found the bones of Monk Gyatso.

results.name: sozin
results.description: The Fire Lord who started the Hundred Year War in an attempt to conquer the world.

results.name: spark harvest
results.description: Art showing the Eternals harvesting planeswalker sparks for Bolas.

results.name: special action
results.description: CR 116: Special actions are actions a player may take when they have priority that don’t use the stack. These are not to be confused with turn-based actions and state-based actions, which the game generates automatically.
